transaction_date: The full date when the property transaction occurred.
year: The year in which the transaction took place.
month: The month in which the transaction took place.
dept_code: The code identifying the department where the property is located.
dept_name: The name of the department where the property is located.
region_code: The code identifying the region where the property is located.
region_name: The name of the region where the property is located.
transaction_type: The raw transaction type value from the source file.
future_sale: Boolean indicating if the sale is for a property that is not yet completed.
property_value: The total financial value of the property in euros.
num_lots: The number of lots involved in the transaction.
num_communes: The number of communes affected by the transaction.
commune_codes: The INSEE commune code or codes associated with the transaction.
num_sections: The number of cadastral sections involved in the transaction.
cadastral_sections: The cadastral section code or codes associated with the transaction.
num_parcels: The number of parcels concerned in the transaction.
parcel_ids: The cadastral parcel identifier or identifiers concerned by the transaction.
transferred_parcel_ids: The cadastral parcel identifier or identifiers that were transferred in the transaction.
land_area: The surface area of the land in square meters.
num_premises: The number of premises transferred in the transaction.
num_houses: The number of houses involved in the transaction.
num_apartments: The number of apartments involved in the transaction.
num_dependencies: The number of dependencies, such as garages or outbuildings.
num_commercial: The number of commercial premises involved.
built_area: The total built surface area in square meters.
house_area: The surface area of houses in square meters.
apartment_area: The surface area of apartments in square meters.
property_type: The raw property type value from the source file.
num_apt_1_room: The number of 1-room apartments in the transaction.
num_apt_2_rooms: The number of 2-room apartments in the transaction.
num_apt_3_rooms: The number of 3-room apartments in the transaction.
num_apt_4_rooms: The number of 4-room apartments in the transaction.
num_apt_5plus_rooms: The number of apartments with 5 or more rooms in the transaction.
num_house_1_room: The number of 1-room houses in the transaction.
num_house_2_rooms: The number of 2-room houses in the transaction.
num_house_3_rooms: The number of 3-room houses in the transaction.
num_house_4_rooms: The number of 4-room houses in the transaction.
num_house_5plus_rooms: The number of houses with 5 or more rooms in the transaction.
area_apt_1_room: The total surface area of 1-room apartments in square meters.
area_apt_2_rooms: The total surface area of 2-room apartments in square meters.
area_apt_3_rooms: The total surface area of 3-room apartments in square meters.
area_apt_4_rooms: The total surface area of 4-room apartments in square meters.
area_apt_5plus_rooms: The total surface area of apartments with 5 or more rooms in square meters.
area_house_1_room: The total surface area of 1-room houses in square meters.
area_house_2_rooms: The total surface area of 2-room houses in square meters.
area_house_3_rooms: The total surface area of 3-room houses in square meters.
area_house_4_rooms: The total surface area of 4-room houses in square meters.
area_house_5plus_rooms: The total surface area of houses with 5 or more rooms in square meters.
